content.text:
<user_query>
Validate that current /sweep-fuyao command and related skills now enforce required payload collection through interactive prompts and are aligned with dispatcher required fields/defaults. Only report remaining mismatches or risks around defaults, required fields, and interactive flow.
</user_query>

Remaining issues found are focused on flow consistency and edge-case risk; the core required payload contract itself is aligned.

1. Medium — `/sweep-fuyao` and `/sweep-fuyao`-related skill docs are stricter than `hp-sweep-orchestrator` in optional-prompt coverage  
`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/commands/sweep-fuyao.md:52-109` and `/Users/HanHu/.cursor/skills/sweep-fuyao/SKILL.md:26-41` require/prompt optional fields like `ssh_alias`, `gpu_type`, `priority`, and `experiment`.  
`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/skills/hp-sweep-orchestrator/SKILL.md:47-50` explicitly says it does not expose every default interactively, and the optional list omits those knobs, so prompt coverage differs by entry point.  

2. Medium — verify step can target a different default SSH alias than dispatch by default  
`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/commands/sweep-fuyao.md:155-157` and `163-167` execute `verify_fuyao_jobs.sh` without `--ssh-alias`, while  
`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/scripts/verify_fuyao_jobs.sh:24` defaults to `Huh8.remote_kernel.fuyo`.  
Dispatch default is `remote.kernel.fuyo` (`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:9`, `/Users/HanHu/.cursor/commands/sweep-fuyao.md:64-66`), so verification can silently run against the wrong alias unless that alias maps equivalently in SSH config.  

3. Low — `continue_on_error` validation error text is wrong  
`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:701-704` prints `dry_run` in an error branch that is validating `CONTINUE_ON_ERROR`, which makes bad-payload debugging noisy and misleading.

4. Low — `Q1` task options in the command are static and may drift from registry-driven validation  
`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/commands/sweep-fuyao.md:20-28` offers a fixed task list, while dispatcher validation accepts any task present in the registry file (`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:164-181`).  
If registry entries change and this list is not updated, users may see extra friction in interactive flow.

5. Low (assumption-based) — optional `hp_class_map` collection is unconstrained in command flow  
`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/commands/sweep-fuyao.md:111` says free-form JSON text, while dispatcher expects a map object (`/Users/HanHu/.cursor/scripts/deploy_fuyao_sweep_dispatcher.sh:156-160`, `484-487`), so malformed JSON will fail at dispatch time rather than during prompt/validation.
